seoTitle: Trafalgar South vs Tragowel — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Trafalgar South and Tragowel. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Trafalgar South vs Tragowel: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Trafalgar South and Tragowel.
heading: Trafalgar South vs Tragowel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trafalgar South, Victoria and Tragowel, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tragowel has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Trafalgar South (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trafalgar South or Tragowel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trafalgar South has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Tragowel scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trafalgar South scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Tragowel scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trafalgar South or Tragowel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tragowel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
